scripts.empbuild: corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/chain build && corepack pnpm emp:prod && corepack pnpm run /^empbuild:.*/
scripts.mf:prod: pnpm --filter mf-host --filter mf-app build && pnpm --filter mf-host --filter mf-app start
scripts.vue:prod: pnpm --filter vue-3-base --filter vue-3-project build && pnpm --filter vue-3-base --filter vue-3-project start
scripts.vue2:prod: pnpm --filter vue-2-base --filter vue-2-project build && pnpm --filter vue-2-base --filter vue-2-project start
scripts.cloudflare:mf-cjs: cross-env DEPLOY=cloudflare pnpm --filter mf-host --filter mf-app build
scripts.cloudflare:mf-react: cross-env DEPLOY=cloudflare pnpm --filter mf-app --filter mf-host build
scripts.cloudflare:mf-vue2: cross-env DEPLOY=cloudflare pnpm --filter vue-2-project --filter vue-2-base build
scripts.cloudflare:mf-vue3: cross-env DEPLOY=cloudflare pnpm --filter vue-3-project --filter vue-3-base build
scripts.test:cli: corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/chain build && corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/cli test && corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/cli test:real
scripts.test:packages: corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/share test && corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/chain test && corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/plugin-react test
scripts.test:ts7:prepare: corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/chain build && corepack pnpm --filter @empjs/cli build
scripts.test:ts7: corepack pnpm test:ts7:prepare && corepack pnpm dlx --package typescript@7.0.1-rc tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:ts7:packages: corepack pnpm test:ts7:prepare && corepack pnpm dlx --package typescript@7.0.1-rc tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/cli/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm dlx --package typescript@7.0.1-rc tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/plugin-react/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm dlx --package typescript@7.0.1-rc tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/emp-share/tsconfig.json && corepack pnpm dlx --package typescript@7.0.1-rc tsc --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/emp-chain/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:tsgo: corepack pnpm test:ts7:prepare && corepack pnpm dlx --package @typescript/native-preview@7.0.0-dev.20260624.1 tsgo --noEmit --pretty false --project packages/cli/tsconfig.json
scripts.ci:verify: corepack pnpm workflow:check && corepack pnpm test:toolchain && corepack pnpm test:tsconfig && corepack pnpm test:ts7:packages && corepack pnpm test:tsgo && corepack pnpm test:cli && corepack pnpm test:packages && corepack pnpm test:rules && corepack pnpm release:check && corepack pnpm check:rslib-presets
scripts.apps:acceptance: corepack pnpm empbuild && corepack pnpm apps:check && corepack pnpm test:apps:single && corepack pnpm test:apps:mf && corepack pnpm test:library-output
